q: Do you offer mobile mechanic services?
a: Yes! I come to your location anywhere in Kimana and surrounding areas. Just call or WhatsApp me.

q: How much does a diagnostic check cost?
a: Engine diagnostic starts from KSh 1,500. I also offer free visual inspections for minor issues.
I serve Kimana town, Oloitokitok, Tarakea Highway, and all surrounding villages within 20km.
Yes! I provide 24/7 on-call emergency service. Call me anytime for breakdowns.

q: Do you work with other mechanics?
a: Yes! For specialized jobs, I work with a trusted network of mechanics in Kimana to ensure the job is done right.
